title: Radiant Slovakian Ricotta Bowl
description: A nutty, light, energizing Slovakian dish featuring creamy ricotta, miso-marinate, and keto-friendly toppings.
instructions: In a small bowl whisk together ricotta, miso paste, olive oil, lemon zest, and a pinch of sea salt until smooth.
Heat a nonstick skillet over medium heat and toast the walnuts for 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently, until golden.
While walnuts toast, gently sauté the spinach in the same skillet for 1-2 minutes until wilted; set aside.
Slice the avocado into cubes and set aside.
If using salmon, lightly sear the salmon fillets in a hot pan for 2 minutes per side, then break into flakes.
Spoon the ricotta mixture into a bowl as the base layer.
Top with sautéed spinach, toasted walnuts, avocado cubes, and salmon flakes if using.
Drizzle a splash of olive oil over the bowl and sprinkle with chia seeds for added texture.
Garnish with fresh dill or microgreens if desired.
Serve immediately and enjoy the nutty, energizing flavor.
